steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "vast majority of cases" is the decisive clue here. It indicates a high success rate and demands an adverb reflecting consistent effectiveness.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The word "reliably" directly aligns with the strong success implied by "vast majority of cases," emphasizing consistent and trustworthy performance. The other choices either contradict the positive context (clumsily, rarely) or fail to address the success metric (slowly). That matches choice A — A is correct.
